data.title: FIBK: Net interest margin and profitability improved, despite lower loan and deposit balances
data.description:
Net interest margin expanded for the ninth straight quarter, with net income rising to $83.9 million and continued share repurchases. Loan and deposit balances declined due to elevated payoffs and a branch sale, but core relationship metrics and capital ratios improved.

Based on

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.title: AXichem Gets Positive Scientific Opinion From EFSA
TATACONSUM: Strong double-digit revenue and profit growth driven by innovation and premium segments
data.description:
Revenue grew 12% year-over-year, led by 47% growth in new businesses and strong innovation. EBITDA rose 19% with margin expansion, while net profit increased 29%. Guidance remains for double-digit growth and 50-70 bps margin expansion, with continued focus on premiumization and innovation.

Based on

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.description:
RNS Number : 8451N CMC Markets Plc 24 July 2026  

CMC MARKETS PLC

RESULTS OF 2026 ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING

CMC Markets plc ("the Company"), announces that at the Company's 2026 Annual General Meeting ("AGM") held earlier today at 133 Houndsditch, London, EC3A 7BX, all the resolutions set out in the Notice of Annual General Meeting 2026 were passed by way of a poll.

In accordance with Listing Rule UKLR 6.4.2R, copies of all the resolutions passed other than resolutions concerning ordinary business will shortly be submitted to the National Storage Mechanism and will be available for inspection at https://data.fca.org.uk/#/nsm/nationalstoragemechanism

data.title: EFSI: Adjusted net income fell to $2.2M as higher provisions offset strong loan growth and margin gains
data.description:
Net income was $5M ($0.92/share), with adjusted net income at $2.2M ($0.41/share) after a one-time gain. Strong loan growth and margin expansion offset higher provision expenses from specific credit relationships. Credit quality challenges remain concentrated, not systemic.

Based on

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.title: AMTB: Strong international deposit growth and improved profitability support positive 2026 outlook
data.description:
Second quarter saw strong asset and deposit growth, especially from international markets, with improved profitability and capital ratios. Strategic initiatives in credit, efficiency, and relationship management are driving sustainable growth, with guidance for continued margin stability and ROA improvement by year-end.

data.title: CREDITACC: Record Q1 growth, 720% PAT surge, and robust asset quality drive strong profitability
data.description:
Q1 FY 2027 delivered record portfolio growth, strong asset quality, and a 720% YoY PAT increase, with ROA at 5.9% and ROE at 24.4%. Retail finance now forms 20.6% of AUM, and guidance for INR 50,000 crore AUM by 2028 is maintained, with robust liquidity and capital buffers.

data.title: NTPC: Revenue and profit rose year-over-year, with robust margins and full regulatory compliance
data.description:
Standalone and consolidated revenues and profits grew year-over-year, with strong margins and no deviations in capital allocation. Regulatory and tax adjustments impacted results, and all financial covenants and security cover requirements were met.

data.title: LW: North America drove growth and margin gains, while EMEA challenges weighed on international results
data.description:
Fiscal 2026 saw strong North America growth, offsetting international headwinds, with robust cash flow and cost savings. Fiscal 2027 guidance anticipates flat to modest sales growth, improved margins, and continued capital discipline, while EMEA remains a challenge.

data.title: LODHA: Record revenue, margin expansion, and reduced net debt drive strong Q1FY27 performance
data.description:
Record Q1FY27 revenue and PAT were achieved, with strong margin expansion and robust pre-sales. Net debt was further reduced, and a significant launch pipeline supports FY27 guidance. Data center and annuity income segments are set for rapid growth, while industry trends and moderate cost inflation support a positive outlook.

Original document: Lodha Developers Ltd. [LODHA] Slides Release — Jul. 27 2026

PUBLIC OPENING POSITION DISCLOSURE/DEALING DISCLOSURE BY

Rule 8.3 of the Takeover Code (the "Code")

1.         KEY INFORMATION

(a) Full name of discloser:

Perpetual Limited and its related bodies corporate

(b) Owner or controller of interests and short positions disclosed, if different from 1(a):

The naming of nominee or vehicle companies is insufficient.  For a trust, the trustee(s), settlor and beneficiaries must be named.

N/A

(c) Name of offeror/offeree in relation to whose relevant securities this form relates:

Use a separate form for each offeror/offeree

A consortium comprising LondonMetric Property plc and Schroder Real Estate Investment Trust Limited

N/A

23/07/2026

Yes

data.title: Markets Muted Amidst Rate Hike Fears
JINDALSTEL: Q1FY27 saw INR 17,834 cr revenue, 66% value-added sales, and strong liquidity amid robust demand
data.description:
Gross revenue reached INR 17,834 cr in Q1FY27, with adjusted EBITDA at INR 2,667 cr and PAT at INR 844 cr. Value-added steel sales rose to 66%, and net debt/EBITDA was 1.71x. India led global steel demand growth, while spreads improved despite higher input costs.

Original document: Jindal Steel Limited [JINDALSTEL] Slides Release — Jul. 25 2026

Disclaimer

BAH: Solid Q1 profitability and growth in national security offset civil declines; outlook reaffirmed
data.description:

Investments in cyber, defense tech, and AI are driving future growth, and the Ultra I&C Mission Solutions acquisition is set to strengthen the defense tech portfolio.
